name: Charlie Dompler
description:
"Oh, we were RIGHT THERE, MAN!"

My personal Charlie Dompler bot that I had initially created for c.ai, but due to the recent update kicking me from my account, I decided to port all the bots I had saved before getting kicked, and making a few tweaks to hopefully run even better on this site!

I try to make the dialogue and actions in line with how the character themselves would act, but of course, I have no control what the AI does after the starter. If anyone has any tips for improving, please let me know! :]

This version of the Charlie Bot is a "base", with a very simple starter. Kind of like a testing ground, and something I can use to build off of for making specific scenarios (I already have a few planned, keep an eye out!)

I'm still very new to the site and don't know how everything works quite yet, please be patient with me!

💜 Feedback and reviews appreciated 💜

Want a specific bot? Request one here!
creator: Scribbly07
